content: صباح النور Alex. Ready when you are. What's on your plate today?
أريد أن أنهي تكامل التليجرام. but the webhook URL keeps timing out

Got it — Telegram integration finishing up, webhook is timing out. A few likely causes: (1) the webhook URL isn't publicly reachable, (2) Telegram requires HTTPS with a valid cert, (3) your bot token might be using webhook+polling mode conflict. What's the current setup?
الـ webhook URL هو https://nullalis.io/api/v1/users/1/channels/telegram/incoming. valid cert. and I'm using webhook only no polling

URL and cert sound fine. Telegram's webhook timeout is 10 seconds — if your endpoint doesn't return 200 within 10s, Telegram retries up to 4 times then disables. Check your gateway logs for the incoming webhook request. Are you returning 200 immediately or doing the work synchronously?
أعتقد أنني أعمل synchronously. that might be it. let me check
Yes, that's almost certainly it. Pattern: enqueue the message to a queue, return 200 to Telegram immediately, then process the queue async. The agent reply doesn't need to make Telegram wait.
OK fixed it. enqueued to event_bus. returning 200 immediately now. شكرا
العفو. Telegram should now be stable. If you see any retry storms in the logs, that's a sign the queue isn't draining fast enough — but you're already on the event_bus pattern so it should be fine.
